greeting: Hee hee! You see them too, don't you? The lights in the stones? NO? Then you're blind!
Go away! Or stay. It makes no difference. The road remembers either way.
I knew you'd come. The crows told me. They tell me everything.
quest: The voices say there's something buried beneath the crooked tree — the one that grows sideways. Dig it up! DIG IT UP! Then... then they'll stop screaming.
idle: Three kings, three cups, three lies... no, that's not right...
Shh! Did you hear that? The ground is breathing again.
